roles.name: Pirate King's Strategist
roles.description: Charts the course across the Grand Line — designs the over-arching solution and watches over its integrity.

roles.name: Ship's Navigator
roles.description: Reads the Log Pose and the weather — holds the timeline and answers to the Captain.

roles.name: Quartermaster of the Hold
roles.description: Steward of the ship's stores — records, layouts, fields and permission sets.

roles.name: Master Shipwright
roles.description: Builds and rebuilds the ship — Apex, LWC, and platform features at the dry dock.

roles.name: Fleet Admiral of the West Blue
roles.description: Captain over all Salesforce craft — sets standards and guides the senior shipwrights.

roles.name: Veteran Marine Captain
roles.description: Patrols the Grand Line with practiced craft — drives senior delivery work.

roles.name: Marine Petty Officer
roles.description: Carries discovery and configuration across the seas under the Captain's eye.

roles.name: Den Den Mushi Architect
roles.description: Architect of the great snail networks between Salesforce and the realms beyond.

roles.name: Senior Snail Operator
roles.description: Lays the wires of API, middleware, and event flows under the Architect's plan.

roles.name: Apprentice Snail Operator
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration — webhooks, batch, callouts and the patterns of error handling.

roles.name: Marine Inspector
roles.description: Hunts the bugs and bounties in the build before they reach the Captain.

roles.name: Town Crier of Loguetown
roles.description: Lifts the banner and the Jolly Roger for product and message — leads all marketing craft.

roles.name: Senior News Coo
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — flies the headlines across the seas.

roles.name: News Coo Apprentice
roles.description: Carries the campaign forward into the field — content, creative, and the daily delivery.

roles.name: Cipher Pol Analyst
roles.description: Decodes what is needed and what is promised — translates between the customer and the crew.

roles.name: Vice Admiral Shipwright
roles.description: Master craftsman of the West Blue dockyards — builds the most complex Apex and platform features.

roles.name: Cabin Boy Consultant
roles.description: First voyage on the Grand Line — supports configuration, learns the trade winds.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts in the past — past weeks get Time Entries, future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

realms.projectName: Straw Hat Pirates — Thousand Sunny CRM Voyage

realms.subAccountName: The Seven Warlords of the Sea

world-government-marines.themedRole: Fleet Admiral of the West Blue

revolutionary-army.themedRole: Fleet Admiral of the West Blue

straw-hat-pirates.name: Setting Sail from Foosha
straw-hat-pirates.description: Discovery sign-off — the Straw Hat sets out from Foosha Village.

straw-hat-pirates.name: Forging the Thousand Sunny
straw-hat-pirates.description: Build kickoff: Franky lays the Adam Wood keel at Water Seven.

straw-hat-pirates.name: Sabaody Archipelago Council
straw-hat-pirates.description: Mid-project gate: crew strategy review at the bubble grove.

straw-hat-pirates.name: Marineford Diversion
straw-hat-pirates.description: Phase invoice trigger: feint at the Marine HQ to draw the eye.

straw-hat-pirates.name: Crowning of the Pirate King
straw-hat-pirates.description: Go-Live: the One Piece is found and the crown claimed.

straw-hat-pirates.name: Captain's Hand-off
straw-hat-pirates.description: Hyper-care close: command passed to the next-generation crew.

world-government-marines.name: Muster at Marineford
world-government-marines.description: Project kickoff: the fleet assembles at HQ.

world-government-marines.name: Buster Call Deployed
world-government-marines.description: Build phase: full naval response operationalised.

world-government-marines.name: Enies Lobby Verdict
world-government-marines.description: UAT gate: justice procedures pass review.

world-government-marines.name: Battle of Marineford
world-government-marines.description: Go-Live: the war for the Pirate King's son is fought.

world-government-marines.name: Return to New HQ
world-government-marines.description: Hyper-care close: HQ relocates to the New World.

shichibukai.name: Royal Summons
shichibukai.description: Discovery: warlords summoned to Mary Geoise.

shichibukai.name: World Government Audit
shichibukai.description: Solution review with the Five Elders themselves.

shichibukai.name: System Disbanded
shichibukai.description: Project close: warlord pacts dissolved by the Reverie.

shichibukai.name: Final Bounty Reckoning
shichibukai.description: Final invoice — pardons revoked, bounties restored.

revolutionary-army.name: Council at Baltigo
revolutionary-army.description: Kickoff council in the revolutionary stronghold.

revolutionary-army.name: Liberation of a Kingdom
revolutionary-army.description: Discovery: first oppressed kingdom freed and modelled.

revolutionary-army.name: Weave the Cell Network
revolutionary-army.description: Build: dashboards woven across all four armies.

revolutionary-army.name: Reverie Disruption
revolutionary-army.description: UAT acceptance: covert operation succeeds at the world summit.

revolutionary-army.name: Dawn of the Revolution
revolutionary-army.description: Go-Live + handoff: the new world order takes shape.

revolutionary-army.name: Final Liberation Invoice
revolutionary-army.description: Final invoice from the Revolutionary command.

Monkey D. Luffy.notes: Meat-eating contest at Water Seven — unmissable.

Roronoa Zoro.notes: Got lost finding the bathroom — back when found.

Tony Tony Chopper.notes: Drum Island medical conference — Doctorine insisted.

Monkey D. Garp.notes: Visiting his grandsons — uninvited as usual.

Kuzan Aokiji.notes: Bicycle tour of the South Blue — slow ride.

Boa Hancock.notes: Amazon Lily court business — empress duties.

Dracule Mihawk.notes: Solo retreat at Kuraigana — wine and swordcraft.

Sabo.notes: Dadan's mountain hideout visit — sworn-brother tradition.
